ddls:
CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the advertiser */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the advertiser */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the advertiser operates */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager assigned to the advertiser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the advertiser record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the advertiser record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement */,
  "placement_name" TEXT /* Name of the placement */,
  "media_channel" TEXT /* Media channel where the placement is hosted (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the placement */,
  "geographic_target" TEXT /* Geographic location targeted by the placement */,
  "device_target" TEXT /* Type of device targeted by the placement (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the placement */,
  "expected_audience_size" INTEGER /* Expected size of the target audience */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser who owns the placement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the placement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the placement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the placement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the placement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser running the campaign */,
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the placement used in the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the campaign */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* IDs of the creative assets used in the campaign */,
  "target_audience_size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the target audience */,
  "expected_revenue" REAL /* Expected revenue from the campaign */,
  "actual_revenue" REAL /* Actual revenue generated by the campaign */,
  "optimization_status" TEXT /* Current status of campaign optimization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_placement_id FOREIGN KEY ("placement_id") REFERENCES placements ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions recorded */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent on the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks recorded */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions recorded */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per conversion */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., account manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
